xwikidoc.name: TourTranslations
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content:
# App name tour.app.name=Tour
# Class fields TourCode.TourClass_description=विवरण TourCode.TourClass_isActive=सक्रिय TourCode.TourClass_targetPage=लक्ष्य पृष्ठ
# Live table generic keys tour.livetable.doc.title=यात्रा का नाम tour.livetable._actions=कार्रवाही tour.livetable._actions.edit=संपादित करें tour.livetable._actions.delete=हटाएं tour.livetable._actions.launch=लॉन्च tour.livetable.emptyvalue=-
# Live table specific keys tour.livetable.description=Description tour.livetable.isActive=Active tour.livetable.targetPage=Target Page tour.livetable.targetClass=Target Class
# Tour popover tour.popover.previous=« Prev tour.popover.next=Next » tour.popover.end=End tour ### Missing: tour.popover.quit= tour.popover.show=Show tour tour.popover.show.hint=You can restart the tour by clicking this button at anytime
# Steps TourCode.StepClass_order=Order TourCode.StepClass_element=Element (CSS selector that identify an element) TourCode.StepClass_title=Title TourCode.StepClass_content=Content TourCode.StepClass_backdrop=Backdrop TourCode.StepClass_placement=Placement TourCode.StepClass_targetPage=Target Page TourCode.StepClass_action=Target Action TourCode.StepClass_queryString=Query String ### Missing: TourCode.StepClass_reflex= tour.steps=Steps tour.steps.new_step=New step tour.steps.add_step=Add step tour.steps.edit_step=Edit step tour.steps.save_step=Save tour.steps.delete_confirm=Are you sure you want to delete the step? tour.steps.delete_done=Delete step done! tour.steps.deleting=Deleting step... tour.steps.yes=Yes tour.steps.no=No tour.steps.edit=Edit tour.steps.delete=Delete
# Upgrade tour.upgrade.title=Upgrade tour.upgrade.successList=Successfully converted the following pages: tour.upgrade.successNothing=You have nothing to upgrade!
# Template tour.template.name=Tour tour.template.description=Step by step tour
